name: KnowledgeBase
description: A collection of data sources that provides contextual information to AI agents.

id.description: Unique identifier of the knowledge base.

name.description: Display name of the knowledge base.

description.description: Human-readable description of the knowledge base's content.

folder_id.description: ID of the folder containing this knowledge base.

source_type.description: The type of data sources used in this knowledge base.

data_sources.description: List of data sources configured for this knowledge base.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the knowledge base was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the knowledge base was last updated.
